title: Motion Blur X
body:
MotionBlurX adds a smooth temporal motion blur effect to Minecraft on Fabric for 1.21.11. It gives camera movement a cleaner, more cinematic feel while staying lightweight and easy to use. You can adjust the blur strength in game with a simple command to match your preference.

Base of: https://modrinth.com/mod/motionblur

- Command

    /motionblur <percent>: to change the strength of blur
